message:
Command `pkill -9 vvp iverilog python3 2>/dev/null
sleep 2
# Check what's currently running/blocking
ps aux | grep -E "vvp|iverilog|python3.*verify|python3.*debug" | grep -v grep | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

sleep 2
# Check what's currently running/blocking
ps aux | grep -E "vvp|iverilog|python3.*verify|python3.*debug" | grep -v grep | head -10"}

content: user      158293  0.0  0.0   4056  2092 ?        S    09:44   0:00 /bin/bash -l -c cd '/workspace' >/dev/null 2>&1 && set -a; [ -f /etc/environment ] && . /etc/environment >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; set +a; export PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT:-/nc/apps/pdk}; export NC_LIB_ROOT=${NC_LIB_ROOT:-/nc/apps}; export NC_SOCGEN_ROOT=${NC_SOCGEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/nc_socgen}; export PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT=${PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/padframe-gen}; export NC_RV32_ROOT=${NC_RV32_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_rv32/v1.1.0}; export NC_AMBA_ROOT=${NC_AMBA_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_amba/v1.1.0};  (cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526 # Kill any hanging vvp processes pkill -9 vvp 2>/dev/null pkill -9 iverilog 2>/dev/null  # Run debug runner with 30s per simulation timeout, no more python3 /tmp/debug_runner.py 2>&1 & BGPID=$! # Wait 120s then collect output sleep 120 kill $BGPID 2>/dev/null wait $BGPID 2>/dev/null echo "done")

extras.command:
pkill -9 vvp iverilog python3 2>/dev/null
sleep 2
# Check what's currently running/blocking
ps aux | grep -E "vvp|iverilog|python3.*verify|python3.*debug" | grep -v grep | head -10
